calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-04-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Dan Gailey, and individual and Synapse AI Inc., a Delaware corporation.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Rocio Lopez, CSR #11194. Email: rlopez@sftc.net.

Ryan Tyz, Esq. and Sean Apple, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Nathan Ross, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Dan Gailey, and individual or Synapse AI Inc., a Delaware corporation.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Partnership Agreement and Breach of Contract was filed on May 7, 2018.
Defendant Synapse AI Inc.s' answer to the complaint was filed on July 2, 2018.
Defendant Dan Gailey's answer to the complaint was filed on July 30, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served 10/10/18, setting trial for today, November 4, 2019.
Order Granting Ogletree, Deakins, Nash, Smoak & Stewart's motion to be relieved as attorney of record for defendants Dan Gailey and Synapse AI Inc. was filed on November 30, 2018.
Order Striking defendant Synapse AI Inc.'s answer to the complaint and entering default against said defendant was filed on March 26, 2019.
Order deeming Requests for Admissions as to defendant Dan Gailey ADMITTED ws filed on October 7, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, November 4, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Nathan Ross, and against defendants Dan Gailey, and individual and Synapse AI Inc., a Delaware corporation, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $350,625.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,793.85.
Costs - $1,796.35.
Sanctions - 1,313.90.
Total - $364,529.10.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review signature.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-04-2019 Assigned To Trial Court
